titleStmt.title: SII 22.393: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 393. (A.R. No. 393 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUMAYYAM. SATYAGIRINĀTHA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA. JAṬ. TRIBH. VĪRA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA (II)—4[5]th YEAR

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Dhanus, ba. 8, Wednesday, Hasta, which would correspond to A.D. 1340, December 13. This is Jaṭ. Vīra-Pāṇḍya II who ascended the throne in A.D. 1296.

This registers the sale of pāḍikāval right inclusive of the income from some specified lands in the village, by the Sabhā of Tirumeyyam, in Kāṉa-nāḍu alias Virudarāya-bhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, to Mūvaṉ Kāḍappiḷḷai, a member of the Valaiyar (community) of Mēlaikkurundaṇpiṟai of the Paḍaippaṟṟu (military area ?) in the same nāḍu for a price of 200 paṇam called the Vaḻitiṟandārguḷigai. The specification of the income from the lands are not clear being lost in the damaged portion of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī maṟkittikkumel śrīkoccaṭai paṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattika
ḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu 45vatu dhanu[ su nāya] ṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Aṣṭamiyum
putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattunāḷ kāṉanāṭāṉa virutarāyapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭuppaṭaippaṟṟu me
laikkuruntaṇpiṟai valaiyaril mūvaṉ kāṭappiḷḷaikku Innāṭṭu devahtāṉabrahmateyam tirume
yyattu sabhaikkuc camainta sabhaiyom paāṭikāval pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu nā
ṅkaḷ Ivaṟku Iṟṟaināḷ viṟpāṉ Icaintu viṟkiṉṟa paāṭikāval Eṅkaḷur periyakuḷappuravum veṅkaikuḷap
puravum kaṭṭiyārk kuṭippuravum maṟṟumuḷḷa kuṭikkāṭṭup paṟṟukkaḷum mututaricāṉa puñceyppaṟṟukkaḷum maṟṟu
m Eṅkaḷurppaṟṟil pāṭikāval muṟaimai nivanta(ra)ṅkaḷ Epperp paṭṭatu muṟṟum vilai
kkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom mūvaṉ kāṭappiḷḷaikku sa
bhaikkuc camainta sabhaiyom Ippaṭi viṟṟa Intap pāṭikāval Iṟṟai ṉāḷ vilaimutal niccayitta vāḷā
l (?) vaḻitiṟantār kuḷikai � 2 100 tiyatip paṇam Irunūṟum vilaiyāvaṇak kaḷattu kāṭṭi Eṟṟik kaicelavaṟak ko
ṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom mūvaṉ kāṭappiḷḷaikku pāṭikāval pramāṇam pacāṉam
Āṭikkuṟuvai paṟṟākak kuṟuvai Uḷḷiṭṭa pe ttukku paṉṉiraṇṭu va
Irunūṟṟu Aimpattu Āṟu kuḻi koṇṭatu Ivūrk kālāl māttāl ka
peṟuvārākavum vilai ttukku māttāl Irutūṇi ta yamum
peṟuvārākavum vilai kaiyil kuṭutta vāḷāl vaḻi tiṟantāṉ � 100 2 10
paṇam ttukku māttāl ru peṟuvārākavum ceṅ
ceyta nilattukku komappayir ceyta nilattukku Acalū
vomākavum kā nilattukku Ālaikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku pata
Eṅkaḷūr vācippāṭṭattukku Acalūril pāṭikā
vomākavum nañceyyilu ṭalattukku Uḻavukku tūṇippatakku tā
ṭuppomākavum Ā Āṇṭutoṟum Iṉṉā
ppārākavum
ntrātittavaṟ cella Eṅkaḷ pāṭikāval viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom muvaṉ kāṭa
ppiḷḷaikku tirumeyyattuc cabhaikkuc camaitta capaiyom Ippaṭi viṟṟa pāṭikāval periyakuḷappu
ravu veṅkaikkuḷappuravu kaṭṭiyāṟk kuṭippuravum maṟṟum kuṭikkāṭup paṟṟāṉa neṭuvayal karampaiyaṉ ku
ṭikkāṭu Āṭuvār vayalāṉa muḷḷivayalum veṭṭivayalil vaycciya viruttiyum maṟṟum Ivvūr puñceyp
paṟṟukkaḷum viḷaiñca nilattukku Ippecciṉpaṭi (pā) pāṭikāval peṟuvārākavum Akavayalil tevatāṉam
tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭam taṉmatāṉam Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟil nāṅkaḷ paccai koḷḷum paṟṟukkum Immariyāti pāṭikāval peṟuvā
rākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom muvaṉ kāṭappiḷḷaikku tirumeyyattu sabhai
kku camainta sabhaiyom Ippaṭikkuc cuntarattoḷ nampi Eḻuttu cella nampi Eḻuttu nampiy Āḻvāṉ Eḻuttu tiruma
nampi Aṉantar Eḻuttu caṭakopaṉ Āṇṭaperumāḷ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 22.393 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
